up.units: g/L consumed (batch, initial 5 g/L essentially fully utilized)

sec.units: g/L (0.593-0.742 g/L range across the three glucose strains; minor product)
g/L (0.013-0.45 g/L range; third product in DUSELGlu2, persisted at end)

growth_records.cite: Rastogi G et al. Presence of glucose, xylose, and glycerol fermenting bacteria in the deep biosphere of the former Homestake gold mine, South Dakota. Frontiers in Microbiology (2013). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2013.00018. [PMC3573265]
growth_records.snippet: the yield of ethanol in DUSELGlu2 strain was 0.304 g of ethanol/g of glucose which was 60% of theoretical maximum yield ... Specific growth rate μ(h−1) 0.032 ... pH 10.0 − 3.7
growth_records.notes: Bacillus sp. isolate (only non-Clostridium of 8; per 16S phylogeny). Batch fermentation of 5 g/L glucose at pH10, 37°C, anaerobic. μ=0.032 h⁻¹ (Table1, calculated by authors via Eq1 μ=(1/t)ln(Xi/X0)). doubling_time = ln2/μ = 0.6931/0.032 = 21.7 h. Ethanol conc derived = Y_EtOH/S(0.304 g/g) × 5 g/L glucose = 1.52 g/L. Yxs=0.007 g biomass/g glucose (Table1; biomass quantified as total cell protein, not gDW, so uptake not convertible to mmol/gDW/h). pH dropped 10.0→3.7. Ethanol formed post-exponential (non-growth-associated).

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 899 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/899

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 899 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/899
